subtitle: Reuse old devices offline
promotionalText: Turn an older iPhone or iPad into a simple offline clock and calendar.
description: Old Device Clock & Calendar helps you reuse an older iPhone or iPad as a simple clock and monthly calendar display. The app works offline and keeps the experience focused: an analog clock, a monthly calendar, light and dark appearance, and a choice of week start day. No account. No ads. No tracking. No subscriptions. Just a one-time purchase for a quiet, always-available clock and calendar.
keywords: offline clock,calendar,old iphone,old ipad,desk clock,analog,ipad clock
reviewNotes: No sign-in is required. The app works offline. Open Settings from the small Info button in the top-right corner. The app contains no ads, no account system, no subscriptions, and no in-app purchases.
